expositionText: My {quest_focus} has been missing for days now. I fear the worst. The last anyone saw, they were heading {location_hint}.
acceptText: Thank you. Please, collect {gather_count} {quest_item} from the area. It may help us track where they went.
declineText: I... I understand. Not everyone can help. I'll keep searching alone.
skillcheckPassText: You notice signs of a struggle near the settlement. This won't be a simple search.
skillcheckFailText: You look around but nothing stands out. Still, you can help.
expositionTurnInText: You found these? Then they were definitely out there. But something feels wrong.
conflict1Text: I've heard rumors of {enemy_type_plural} lurking {location_hint}. Kill {gather_count} of them. They may have something to do with this.
conflict1TurnInText: Those creatures... they were guarding something. I knew it.
conflict2Text: There's one more thing. Speak with {target_npc}. They saw something the night my {quest_focus} disappeared.
conflict2TurnInText: So that's what happened. At least now we know the truth.
resolutionText: I can finally grieve properly. Or perhaps... hope. You've done more than I could have asked. Thank you, truly.
